text:
Created attachment 248822
dmesg output

Upon reviewing two files located at the specified path, I noticed an absence of references to the 2015 Late iMac 27" 5K (iMac 17,1). As a result, I am encountering several ACPI error messages during the boot process. Can someone examine the Linux driver and apply a corresponding patch for FreeBSD compatibility? For further reference, I have attached the "dmesg.txt" file.

* /usr/src/sys/dev/asmc/asmc.c
* /usr/src/sys/dev/asmc/asmcvar.h
